info.title: MbPA Building Permission Portal API
info.description: Mumbai Port Authority Special Planning Authority — UPDR-2026 building permission workflow.

get.description: Return a CSRF cookie. React calls this once on mount.

CertificateTypeEnum.description:
* `aip` - Approval in Principle
* `development_permission` - Development Permission
* `commencement_plinth` - Commencement Certificate to Plinth
* `further_commencement` - Further Commencement Certificate
* `commencement_80pct` - Commencement Certificate (80% BUA)
* `commencement_rem20` - Commencement Certificate (Remaining 20%)
* `building_completion` - Building Completion Certificate
* `oc` - Occupancy Certificate
* `demolition_clearance` - Demolition & Site Clearance Certificate

ClearanceTypeEnum.description:
* `railway` - Railway Authority NOC
* `crz` - CRZ / MCZMA Coastal Clearance
* `heritage_mhcc` - MHCC Heritage Clearance
* `aviation_aai` - AAI / Aviation Clearance
* `pollution_mpcb` - MPCB Pollution Control Clearance

username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.
